title: on Austin — week-1 arrival reflection (Sep 20 2025)
html:
TL;DR

  • Yahir's first sit-down week-of-arrival reflection in Austin — "Well I'm here. Everything has worked out pretty well, some even better tbh." Frames the move as "say yes and figure it out later." This is the day Mom flew home; brother and dad already back in Oregon.
  • Internal monologue going crisp — the alone-and-locked-in voice noted as a side-effect of the new isolation. Pairs with the Sep 27 "why do I isolate myself" note one week later when the same isolation curdles.
  • Financial margin documented: ~1 month of savings, will need a second job, "start DoorDashing in the short term." See DoorDash. The "live broke in the face of ambition" posture explicitly named.
  • Lonely-thirst-trap heuristic invented in real time: "if you wouldn't be alright presenting her to your family and friends then maybe don't fuck her" — adjacent to but harder than the lynchpin frame. Then immediately walks it back: "but a big-booty/titted bitch is very fuckable but not necessarily someone I want to write home about." Honest about the tension.
  • The Cam Jipp resentment moment: Yahir lists six interrogation questions for when Cam says he's ready to move ("what's happening with Dudley House, what is gonna be the case with Talia, what are you going to do to contribute short term here, how do I know you are genuinely locked in and not in a short term burst, are you truly deep in your soul ready to do this, you know this is my apartment right?") — early seed of the Brotein cofounder-friction that becomes "camera has been making some midd ass content" by November.

Other beats

  • Hyde Park Gym name-drop as the bodybuilding-culture lock-in he sought from Oregon — "the culture and energy of this place is something I truly have been seeking and never existed in Oregon."
  • Doc tail is a half-drafted job-application paragraph (likely for a Hyde Park gym position) — Yahir as both health-app builder and applicant-for-hospitality-jobs in the same sentence, exposing the funding stack.
  • Internal contradiction surfaced cleanly: "I do want to fuck bitches in Austin, but this should be something natural… not something you do out of pure desire and tech."

Privacy

  • Keannah (named past sexual partner, used to anchor a "sexual desires of a bigger girl" observation) — single first-name mention, queued to Potential Entities below; do not stub without surname.
  • Talia and Dudley House — Cam-Jipp-orbit references; queued.
  • No financial figures beyond "about 1 month of savings."

Relations
